info: PVE: Parrying an attack deals damage to the attacker after a delay. This deals 35% of the attack's damage you parried * your Power level, capping at 500 damage per proc. PVP: Parrying 3 attacks within 7 seconds deals damage to the attacker after a delay. This deals 4% of their maximum hp as damage. Providence's Thorns is parryable, but it does not grant autoparry frames. Certain bosses are entirely immune to Providence Thorns. These are: Maestro Evangarde Rest, Heart of Enmity, Parliament, Kyrsgarde Champion and Titus Fulminus Destellus.
name: Providence's Thorns
